entity.label: Zuph
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Honeycomb, a Kohathite Levite, ancestor of Elkanah and Samuel (1 Sam. 1:1); called also Zophai (1 Chr. 6:26).

nodes.label: Zuph
nodes.description: Honeycomb, a Kohathite Levite, ancestor of Elkanah and Samuel (1 Sam. 1:1); called also Zophai (1 Chr. 6:26).

verses.text: Now there was a certain man of Ramathaimzophim, of mount Ephraim, and his name was Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Elihu, the son of Tohu, the son of Zuph, an Ephrathite:
As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah; Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,
The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,
